evals.description: ES|QL-heavy analytics demo — should invoke Vulcan and produce vulcan-queries.json
evals.prompt: The demo script for 2026-acme-ops has 8 ES|QL query scenes covering real-time fraud scoring, anomaly trends, and agent interaction analytics. Run weave-query before the data modeler. Vulcan is installed at ../vulcan.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs Step 0 and determines Vulcan applies (5+ ES|QL queries). Produces Step 1 context JSON. Instructs SA to run Vulcan and copy all_queries.json to {slug}-vulcan-queries.json. Produces vulcan-queries.json contract with queries[], index_name_map, data_profile_summary.
assertions: Step 0 evaluation table is shown with 'More than 5 distinct ES|QL queries' marked as matching
Vulcan context JSON includes company, pain_points, datasets[], demo_type=analytics
Announces completion with query count, validation summary, and handoff to weave-model

evals.description: Semantic/RAG search demo — should set include_rag=true and wire inference endpoints
evals.prompt: The demo script for 2026-retailco-search includes a semantic product search scene using ELSER, a reranking step, and an LLM completion to generate a purchase recommendation. Run weave-query.
evals.expected_output: Skill sets demo_type=search and include_rag=true in the Vulcan context. RAG pipeline spec included in vulcan-queries.json output. Queries include at least one rag type entry with MATCH/RERANK/COMPLETION chain.
assertions: Output vulcan-queries.json has rag_pipeline field populated (not null)
At least one query entry has query_type=rag

evals.description: Demo with no ES|QL — should skip Vulcan and pass through to weave-model
evals.prompt: The demo script for 2026-simplebank focuses on Kibana dashboards and ML anomaly detection. There are no ES|QL query scenes and no semantic search. Should weave-query run?
evals.expected_output: Skill evaluates Step 0 triggers and determines none are met. States clearly that Vulcan does not apply and should be skipped. Instructs to proceed directly to weave-model.
assertions: Skill explicitly states Vulcan is being skipped
Reason given: no ES|QL scenes and no semantic search
Directs to weave-model as next step

evals.description: Fleet/Beats integration demo — should set use_integrations=true and EPR grounding
evals.prompt: The demo script for 2026-telco-ops references system integration metrics (logs-system.*) and APM data (metrics-apm.*). Run weave-query with integration grounding.
evals.expected_output: Vulcan context sets use_integrations=true with confirmed_integrations=["system", "apm"]. index_name_map in output respects logs-*/metrics-* naming. Skill notes that EPR grounding aligns fields to integration schema for dashboard compatibility.
assertions: Warning included: do not rename index names or fields as this breaks integration dashboards
